results.name: case_09_low_crs_confidence
results.description: GOLDEN CASE 09 — CRS confidence below 60. Ambiguous numeric range. Expected: Dialog T1 fires, analysis halts until user selects CRS manually.
failures: Unexpected error: CRSError: Invalid projection: +proj=aeqd +lat_0=450499.6 +lon_0=650207.2 +datum=WGS84 +units=m +type=crs: (Internal Proj Error: proj_create: Error 1027 (Invalid value for an argument): aeqd: Invalid value for lat_0: |lat_0| should be <= 90°)
